Toggle navigation Corynespora cassiicola (CORYCA) Menu Overview → Photos Documents Overview Code created in: 2002-03-11 Basic information EPPO Code: CORYCA Preferred name: Corynespora cassiicola Authority: (Berkeley & Curtis) Wei Other scientific names Name Authority Cercospora melonis Cooke Cercospora vignicola Kawamura Corynespora melonis (Cooke) Saccardo Helminthosporium cassiicola Berkeley & Curtis Helminthosporium papayae Sydow Helminthosporium vignae Olive Helminthosporium vignicola (Kawamura) Olive Common names Name Language blotch disease of cucurbits English fruit spot of tomato English leaf spot of cotton English leaf spot of tobacco English leaf spot of tomato English target spot of cucurbits English target spot of soybean English Blattbrand: Kürbisgewächse German Blattfleckenkrankheit: Baumwolle German Blattfleckenkrankheit: Kürbisgewächse German cercosporiose du melon French chamuscado de las hojas del melón Spanish mancha foliar de las cucurbitáceas Spanish Propose photo Taxonomy Kingdom Fungi      (
      1FUNGK      ) Phylum Ascomycota      (
      1ASCOP      ) Subphylum Pezizomycotina      (
      1PEZIQ      ) Class Dothideomycetes      (
      1DOTHC      ) Subclass Pleosporomycetidae      (
      1PLEOL      ) Order Pleosporales      (
      1PLEOO      ) Family Corynesporascaceae      (
      1CRCAF      ) Genus Corynespora      (
      1CORYG      ) Species Corynespora cassiicola      (
      CORYCA      )

seed.symptoms: Brown circular lesions with concentric rings and yellow halos on leaves; dark brown fruit lesions; defoliation under severe infection.
seed.causes: Fungus Corynespora cassiicola; thrives in warm, humid, poorly ventilated conditions.
seed.treatment: Fungicides (azoxystrobin, difenoconazole); remove infected plant debris.
seed.prevention: Crop rotation; canopy management; avoid overhead irrigation.
